drmundo__yuumi.notes:
- Yuumi's poke and healing sustain force extended trades; kite away from Mundo's engage
- Yuumi spikes post-first-item; punish early game before she attaches to stronger carry
- Bait her Q cooldown, then all-in immediately; she's vulnerable without healing ready
- Build Hollow Radiance early if Yuumi + another enchanter; amplify grievous wounds coverage

drmundo__mordekaiser.notes:
- Mordekaiser's sustained damage and shield tank stats outscale Mundo's poke early.
- Morde spikes level 6; Mundo punishes pre-6 with cleavers and sustain.
- Bait Morde's E pull, then kite backward while healing; he overextends.
- Build Abyssal Mask after core items to reduce his burst and healing.

drmundo__jarvaniv.notes:
- Jarvan's early armor and burst damage threaten Mundo's health before scaling kicks in.
- Jarvan spikes level 6; punish him pre-6 and when his ult is down.
- Bait Jarvan's EQ combo, then all-in while cooldowns reset and Mundo regenerates.
- Build Kaenic Lifeburst early if Jarvan stacks armor; amplifies your true damage output.

drmundo__lux.notes:
- Lux's long-range poke and root combo prevent Mundo from engaging or healing freely.
- Lux spikes at level 6; punish her pre-6 when cooldowns are long.
- Bait her E into melee range, then all-in before root comes back up.
- Buy Adaptive Helm to reduce her ability damage and shield yourself from burst.

drmundo__draven.notes:
- Draven's early all-in damage and axe resets snowball into unstoppable late-game carry threat.
- Draven spikes level 2-3; punish him post-6 when Mundo gains sustain and tankiness.
- Bait Draven's all-in by walking up, then cleanse with Mundo's passive and outheal.
- Build Spirit Visage early if Draven gets ahead; amplifies your healing against his burst.

drmundo__briar.notes:
- Briar's relentless engage and healing make her dominate all-in fights early game.
- Briar spikes level 6; Mundo punishes her cooldowns and mana constraints pre-6.
- Bait her W leap onto minions, then kite back and chunk her down.
- Buy Thornmail early to reduce her healing and return damage on engages.

drmundo__thresh.notes:
- Thresh's hook and lantern deny Mundo positioning; his utility scales hard.
- Thresh spikes level 6; Mundo punishes him before 6 and post-mythic.
- Bait hook near minions, then all-in when cooldown ends immediately.
- Rush Hollow Radiance if Thresh lands frequent hooks; adapt after mythic.

drmundo__xerath.notes:
- Xerath's long-range poke and CC lock down immobile Mundo from distance safely.
- Xerath spikes at level 6 and two items; punish pre-6 lane phase aggressively.
- Bait Xerath's E stun, then all-in before cooldown resets; dodge backwards.
- Build Adaptive Helm third or fourth to reduce his poke and burst damage.

drmundo__urgot.notes:
- Urgot's low-cooldown shotgun knees lock you down; his execute ult catches careless positioning.
- Urgot spikes at six with execute ult; punish him pre-six with sustained trades.
- Bait his E flip, then all-in while cooldown is down; kite backward afterward.
- Buy Force of Nature early if Urgot lands repeated Qs; reduces poke damage significantly.

drmundo__caitlyn.notes:
- Caitlyn's long-range poke and traps control lane, kite away from your engage attempts.
- Caitlyn spikes early; punish her at level 6 when your ultimate enables all-in.
- Bait her into using traps defensively, then all-in while cooldowns are down.
- Build Force of Nature early if she has multiple magic damage threats on team.

drmundo__irelia.notes:
- Irelia's true damage and mobility let her kite and burst through your tankiness early.
- Irelia spikes at level 6 and Sheen; punish her pre-6 with sustained trading.
- Bait her dash onto minions, then all-in when her Bladesurge cooldown resets poorly.
- Buy Adaptive Helm after core items to reduce her sustained magic damage output.

drmundo__masteryi.notes:
- Master Yi's true damage and attack speed shred your resistances; kite carefully.
- Yi spikes post-6 and with Guinsoo's; punish pre-6 lane and early teamfights.
- Bait Yi's Alpha Strike with your Barrel; land Cleaver during cooldown.
- Build Thornmail early if Yi stacks attack speed; maintains your tankiness well.

drmundo__leona.notes:
- Leona's point-and-click stun chains lock down Mundo; her engage is relentless.
- Leona spikes level 6; punish her pre-6 with poke and sustain.
- Bait her E engage, then kite back; punish her cooldown with aggression.
- Rush Abyssal Mask against her magic damage and to reduce her burst.

drmundo__tristana.notes:
- Threat: Tristana's attack range and burst combo easily kite and burst Dr. Mundo down.
- Spike: Tristana spikes at level 6 with ultimate; punish her pre-6 lane.
- Exploit: Bait her E reset aggression, then all-in when cooldown wasted on minions.
- Item: Buy Force of Nature early if she snowballs; prioritize MR reduction.

drmundo__lillia.notes:
- Lillia's kiting and sustained damage wear Dr. Mundo down over time
- Lillia spikes at level 6; punish her pre-6 with aggression
- Bait her into Q then all-in; she has limited escape tools
- Build Kaenic Lifeburst early to reduce her sustained magic damage

drmundo__swain.notes:
- Swain's root and damage combo lock you down; kite away from his pull range always
- Swain spikes at level 6 ultimate; punish him pre-6 with aggressive short trades
- Bait his root by moving unpredictably, then all-in when cooldown ends immediately
- Buy Adaptive Helm early to reduce his repeated damage and ultimate burn threat

drmundo__yone.notes:
- Yone's mobility and true damage let him kite and burst through your tankiness easily.
- Yone spikes at level 6 and Sheen; punish him pre-6 and before Sheen completion.
- Bait Yone's E return by walking into fog; all-in when he must teleport back.
- Build Force of Nature early if Yone lands consistent hits and stacks magic damage.

drmundo__fiora.notes:
- Fiora's true damage and parry block your tankiness; kite and poke relentlessly early
- Fiora spikes at trinity force; punish her pre-6 and before sheen completion
- Bait her parry on your Q; follow immediately with E for guaranteed damage
- Build Kaenic Lifeburst early to reduce her true damage scaling and heal simultaneously

drmundo__jinx.notes:
- Jinx's long-range poke and cc chain threaten Dr. Mundo's engage attempts constantly.
- Levels 1–3 are dangerous; Jinx kill-window peaks at level 2.
- Jinx spikes at Manamune; Dr. Mundo punishes post-6 when ultimate sustain activates.
- Bait Jinx's root by moving predictably, then all-in during cooldown.
- Build Force of Nature after core items to reduce her burst damage.

drmundo__illaoi.notes:
- Her tentacles deal massive damage; dodge E to avoid all-in burst and test of spirit
- Levels 1–3 manageable, but levels 4–6 extremely dangerous; avoid extended trades near walls
- Illaoi spikes at Mythic; Mundo punishes her if she wastes E cooldown early
- Bait her E tentacle slam, then all-in while cooldown resets; she's vulnerable without it
- Buy Force of Nature early if facing full AD team or multiple magic damage threats

drmundo__tahmkench.notes:
- Tahm Kench's Tongue lash spam and Grey Health shield make trading impossible for Mundo.
- Levels 1–3 are dangerous; avoid all-ins until level 6 ultimate available.
- Tahm spikes at Hollow Radiance; Mundo punishes post-level 9 when cooldowns matter less.
- Bait Tahm's Tongue out, then all-in immediately before cooldown resets for kill.
- Purchase Force of Nature early to reduce his poke damage and Grey Health value.

drmundo__lissandra.notes:
- Lissandra's root and burst combo force Dr. Mundo to play around cooldowns carefully.
- Levels 2–4 are dangerous; Lissandra kills with root into burst combo.
- Lissandra spikes at Lost Chapter; Mundo punishes her post-6 when ult up.
- Bait her E (Ice Shard) into fog, then all-in with Ghost plus ult.
- Build Adaptive Helm after core to reduce her burst damage and cooldown spam.

drmundo__morgana.notes:
- Morgana's binding root locks Mundo down; her pool prevents all-in trades effectively.
- Levels 1–3 manageable; avoid all-ins at level 6 when her ultimate peaks.
- Morgana spikes with Liandry's; Mundo punishes when her binding is on cooldown.
- Bait her binding by moving unpredictably, then all-in during the nine-second window.
- Buy Adaptive Helm after core items to reduce her sustained magic damage output.

drmundo__garen.notes:
- Garen's silence and sustained damage from Judgment wheel shreds Mundo's tankiness and ability to kite.
- Levels 2–4 are dangerous; Garen's all-in combo with Judgment and Courage execute threat peaks early.
- Garen spikes at Stridebreaker; Mundo punishes after Liandry's when sustained magic damage outpaces Garen's burst.
- Bait Garen's Judgment spin near minions, then kite backward using Mundo Cleavers to wear him down.
- Kaenic Lifeburst amplifies your healing against Garen and converts his tankiness into your survivability advantage.

drmundo__veigar.notes:
- Veigar's event horizon stun trap cages you into terrible all-ins; dodge it relentlessly
- Levels 1–3 manageable but deadly at level 6 when his ult executes low-health targets
- Veigar spikes hard at Luden's; Dr. Mundo punishes before level 9 when itemization gaps exist
- Bait Veigar's event horizon by faking all-ins, then disengage when he commits the cooldown
- Purchase Adaptive Helm after core tank items to neuter his AP scaling and burst damage

drmundo__amumu.notes:
- Amumu's bandage toss stun and curse aura deny your sustained damage output completely.
- Play safe at range; let Amumu push early, then farm under tower safely.
- Bait his Q with unpredictable movement; trade only after he wastes cooldown.
- His ultimate lockdown ruins your teamfight presence; position back and watch for engage.
- His first item (ROA or Liandry) doesn't threaten you; this is your farm window.
- You spike harder mid-game with tankiness; abuse him before his team groups heavily.
- Slow-push waves into him; deny early jungle ganks and force his mana spending.
- Take Grasp for sustain and trading; nullifies his poke and stabilizes your lane.
- Buy Adaptive Helm after core tank items; reduces his curse damage significantly.

drmundo__brand.notes:
- Brand's combo chain and passive burn stack will shred your health bar relentlessly.
- Play safe levels 1-3; Brand outranges you hard—farm from distance, avoid close trades.
- Bait his Q with movement; dodge it, then all-in him before cooldowns reset.
- Post-6 his ult bounces to you in teamfights—position behind teammates to reduce damage.
- Brand's first item spike hurts; use this window to farm safely and scale up.
- You spike when you hit Hollow Radiance; abuse tankiness to run him down.
- Slow-push waves into him; he can't contest extended fights when you're stronger.
- Take Grasp of the Undying; bonus health scaling makes you tankier against poke damage.
- Build Adaptive Helm after core items; reduces his burn and magic damage significantly overall.

drmundo__jax.notes:
- Jax's counterstrike blocks your cleavers and converts your aggression into his damage burst
- Play safe level 1-3; farm at range with cleavers, avoid extended trades near minions
- Bait his counterstrike with fake cleaver throws, then all-in when it's down cooldown
- Jax gains tankiness and damage at 6; your all-in window closes significantly post-ultimate
- His Triforce spike around 10-12 minutes is dangerous; respect his burst and disengage
- You spike harder mid-game with Liandry's and CDR; abuse levels 11-13 before his scaling
- Slow-push waves to create gank setup; prevents Jax from freezing and forces his rotation
- Take Grasp for sustained trading and healing to outlast Jax's poke and shorter trades
- Build Adaptive Helm after Liandry's to reduce his burst and his Triforce spike damage

drmundo__rell.notes:
- Rell's mounted engage and E stun lock you down; respect her all-in threat range always
- Play safe level 1-3; dodge her mounted charges, farm at range, don't contest short trades
- Bait her E stun by moving unpredictably, then all-in when she dismounts and loses mobility
- Rell's mounted form ult lockdown becomes lethal; respect teamfight positioning and play around dismounted windows
- Her first item spike (Sunfire or mythic) increases her engage damage; farm safely, don't fight yet
- Post-dismount when her E is down; Dr. Mundo dominates extended trades and 1v1 duels then
- Slow-push waves into her; force her to choose between helping roams or losing tower pressure
- Grasp of the Undying sustains through poke and strengthens short trades when she dismounts
- Force of Nature first if she stacks magic damage heavy; always protects scaling and teamfight survival

drmundo__ashe.notes:
- Ashe kites you endlessly with slows; her poke and range deny your all-in attempts completely.
- Play safe levels 1-3; her range advantage forces passive farming—dodge her W poke, farm under tower.
- Never trade into her kiting pattern; bait her W with movement, then all-in when cooldown expires.
- Ashe ultimate becomes a gank tool and teamfight initiator; respect it and position accordingly always.
- Ashe first item (Manamune or Crown) doesn't spike her damage much; continue farming safely and scaling.
- Your power window arrives at level 9+ when cooldowns reset faster; abuse her immobility then relentlessly.
- Slow-push waves into tower to control Ashe's positioning; deny her safe kiting space and gank setups.
- Take Grasp for sustain and poke mitigation; Phase Rush works too for kite escape utility.
- Rush Kaenic Lifeburst second; the slow resist and healing amplification directly counters Ashe's kiting pressure.

drmundo__warwick.notes:
- Warwick all-ins with sustained damage and lifesteal; his bloodhunt chase is oppressive.
- Play safe early; Warwick outduels you levels 1-3, so farm defensively near tower.
- Avoid trading short; bait his Q then Cleaver him when he commits all-in.
- Warwick ult at six creates gank pressure; ward river and play cautiously mid-map.
- His first item spike (Stride/Trinity) is dangerous; respect his damage window immediately post-completion.
- You spike harder at three items; farm safely, scale, then dominate extended teamfights.
- Slow-push waves into him; deny his roam potential while you scale for teamfights.
- Take Grasp for sustain trading and scaling; Phase Rush works if you need escape.
- Buy Thornmail second or third to reduce his lifesteal and return meaningful damage.

drmundo__ezreal.notes:
- Ezreal kites you endlessly with Q spam and E mobility, staying out of your melee range.
- Play safe; farm from distance with Q. Dodge his Qs when possible. Don't chase early.
- Bait his E dash toward you, then run him down. Avoid walking into his Q poke.
- His ult at 6 is zoning; play around cover. You outscale him significantly mid-game onwards.
- First Manamune spike (2-3 items) hurts; respect his damage. Punish him when he backs.
- Mid-game teamfights (11-15 min) after you stack HP—you run him down in extended fights.
- Slow-push to stack waves, then crash for roam or jungle synergy. Don't hard push early.
- Take Grasp for sustain into his poke and guaranteed melee trades when he overextends.
- Build Force of Nature second if his poke becomes unbearable; sustain advantage wins the lane.

drmundo__zaahen.notes:
- Zaahen's sustained damage and kite potential force you into bad fights or force backs.
- Play safe levels 1-3; farm at range with Cleaver, avoid extended trades near minions.
- Bait his poke with positioning, then all-in when cooldowns are down; dodge his dash.
- Mundo ult sustain now matches his pressure; look to run him down post-six teamfights.
- His first item spike (likely AD/pen) hurts around 10-12 minutes; play safe, don't duel.
- Your spike arrives with Sunfire and Liandry's; Zaahen cannot sustain against your AOE then.
- Slow-push sideways; you eventually win extended trades, forcing him to back or miss farm.
- Take Grasp; win short trades repeatedly, proc often, and stack tankiness for late teamfights.
- Buy Force of Nature if he stacks AD pen; mirrors his damage reduction advantage.

drmundo__singed.notes:
- Singed proxy farms and kites you endlessly; avoid chasing into his poison trail
- Play safe levels 1-3; let him push; farm under tower and deny roams
- Never trade in his poison; bait his flip, then all-in when cooldown burns
- Post-6 his ult speed makes kiting worse; respect the ms advantage, play patient
- His first item spike around 10 minutes is dangerous; don't overextend yet
- You spike harder mid-game with items and levels; look to teamfight then, not duel
- Slow-push waves into him; forces him to choose between proxy and defending
- Take Grasp for reliable sustain trades and scaling in this extended matchup
- Buy Adaptive Helm after core items; nullifies his DoT and ult tank-shred

drmundo__missfortune.notes:
- Miss Fortune's double-up bounces and ultimate burst you down through your high damage output.
- Play safe, respect her poke range, farm with cleaver from distance when possible.
- Dodge her q bounces by positioning behind minions; never all-in before level six.
- Her ultimate forces you to move unpredictably; use your tankiness to absorb chip damage.
- First item spike around ten minutes is dangerous; respect her damage, stay healthy.
- Post-twelve minutes when you stack resistances, you out-tank her sustained poke and win.
- Slow-push waves to set up all-ins when her cooldowns are down; avoid shoving.
- Take Grasp for sustained trading and healing to survive her poke-heavy early pressure.
- Build Adaptive Helm after mythic to reduce her burst damage and sustain better.

drmundo__qiyana.notes:
- Qiyana's burst combo and root lock you down; dodge her empowered Q and E engage
- Play safe levels 1-3; respect her damage and don't overextend near river brush positioning
- Bait her Q with positioning, then trade back with E; dodge her E engage attempts
- Her ultimate creates major gank setup and burst potential; play safer and ward accordingly
- Her first item spike (Duskblade) is dangerous; respect her damage and play extra cautiously
- Post-first-item, you outscale her; use tankiness and ultimate to teamfight and absorb burst
- Slow-push waves to deny her roam opportunities; prevent her from rotating to gank lanes
- Take Grasp for sustainability and health stacking against her poke and burst damage pattern
- Add Adaptive Helm third or fourth to reduce her burst and persistent ability damage

drmundo__kayn.notes:
- Kayn's burst and kiting potential in mid-game forces you into bad positions or dies
- Play safe early; farm at range with Q; avoid letting Kayn stack passive freely
- Dodge his W with movement; bait his dash then trade back with E-Q combo
- Kayn gains major kill threat post-six; respect his ult damage and reposition accordingly
- His first item spike around ten to twelve minutes is a major danger window
- You spike harder at two items and mid-game teamfights; abuse this power window
- Slow-push to deny Kayn roam angles and keep him pressured in sidelane
- Grasp of the Undying for sustain and trading; synergizes with your health scaling perfectly
- Kaenic Lifeburst as third item option strengthens your anti-burst defense and teamfight impact

drmundo__xayah.notes:
- Threat: Xayah's feather root chain locks you down for her team's burst damage
- Early: Play safe levels 1-3; dodge her Q poke and avoid walking into feather zones
- Trading: Bait her E root by positioning unpredictably, then all-in with Q+E when it's down
- Post6: Respect her ult invulnerability frame; don't commit to all-ins when her ult is available
- Spike: First item (IE or Manamune) makes her poke lethal; farm safely and scale instead
- Window: Mid-game teamfights where you're tanky enough to soak root and heal through her damage
- Wave: Slow-push to stack health and poke safely; avoid hard pushing into her root range
- Rune: Grasp of the Undying for sustain and durability against her constant feather pressure
- Item: Force of Nature second or third to further resist her magic damage and poke

drmundo__nami.notes:
- Nami's bubble stun and poke combo catch you out of position; respect her range always
- Play safe levels 1-3; her Q bubble outranges your engage, so farm passively under tower
- Dodge her Q bubble by moving unpredictably; bait it out before committing to trade damage
- Her ultimate channel creates teamfight pressure; use this to splitpush and take objectives elsewhere
- Her first item spike (Mythic) increases her poke damage; farm safely and scale into teamfights
- Dr. Mundo spikes at level 11 with ultimate upgrade; dominate late teamfights with superior tankiness
- Slow-push waves to stack them; force her into unfavorable positions when minions crash your tower
- Take Grasp of the Undying for sustain to offset her poke damage in extended trades
- Build Force of Nature early if she stacks magic damage; reduces her burst and ability haste

drmundo__xinzhao.notes:
- His gap-close and knock-up combo locks you down for his team to burst you hard.
- Play safe, farm at range with cleavers, avoid trading short until you hit level three.
- Bait his Audacious Charge, then cleaver-trade back; never fight him in minion waves directly.
- His ultimate zones you from fights; respect the knockback and play around it carefully.
- His trinity spike hurts; play defensive, farm safely, scale into your tankier mid-game form.
- Post-twelve minutes when you have more health and resistances to tank his combo.
- Slow-push to deny his all-in engage range; reset waves near your turret consistently.
- Grasp of the Undying for sustain and health scaling against his physical burst damage.
- Spirit Visage second if ahead, or after mythic—helps you sustain through poke and burst.

drmundo__malzahar.notes:
- Malzahar's void pools and suppression ultimate create zone-control that prevents Mundo from engaging or escaping safely.
- Play safe early; his E poke damages and slows you, making all-ins risky before level three.
- Bait his E onto minions instead of you, then trade back hard with Q when it's down.
- Malzahar gains massive kill pressure at level six; stay behind minions and never fight near his voidlings.
- His first item spike (Lost Chapter into Liandry) hurts; play passive farming, avoid extended trades, wait for ganks.
- You outscale post-fifteen minutes; farm safely and force him into sidelanes where his ultimate matters less.
- Slow-push to stack minions safely away from his turret; prevents his E poke while letting you scale.
- Take Grasp for sustain and trading power; it mitigates his poke damage and aids extended fights.
- Build Adaptive Helm as third item to reduce his persistent magic damage and voidling harassment significantly.

drmundo__twitch.notes:
- Twitch's invisible positioning lets him kite and burst from unexpected angles repeatedly.
- Play safe and farm defensively; Twitch outranges you hard early, avoid pushing up.
- Bait his Expunge with movement, then trade back with Cleaver when he commits.
- His ultimate turns him into a threat across the map; respect positioning and vision.
- His first item spike (usually Manamune) significantly increases his damage; play safer then.
- You spike harder at two items; look to force fights when he's isolated.
- Slow-push waves to create a numbers advantage; Twitch struggles in confined teamfights.
- Take Grasp for sustain and poke damage to pressure him safely in lane.
- Buy Adaptive Helm early if he gets ahead; it reduces his sustained burst.

drmundo__seraphine.notes:
- Seraphine roots you with E, then chains damage; dodge her ability combos or die.
- Play safe levels 1-3; her poke outranges you. Farm under tower, avoid her Q spam.
- Bait her E root, then all-in with Q cleanse and W tankiness for extended trade.
- Her ultimate locks you down hard; respect the range and position behind minions always.
- First item Luden's is a danger window; she chunks you harder—respect her damage spike.
- Post-6 when she can't ult; all-in her before cooldown resets for kill pressure.
- Slow-push to deny her ult safety; force her toward you where range disadvantage hurts.
- Take Grasp for sustain and poke trading; you'll need healing to survive her poke.
- Buy Abyssal Mask after core items; reduces her magic damage and helps you survive teamfights.

drmundo__naafiri.notes:
- Naafiri's burst and execute damage from close range; respect her all-in threat constantly.
- Play safe; her early aggression is strong. Farm at range, avoid her charge range.
- Dodge her Q poke; bait her E, then trade back with Q spam aggressively.
- Her ultimate gives mobility and damage amp; play around walls and respect repositioning threat.
- First item spike (Prowler's/Serpent) is dangerous; play defensive, scale into tankiness advantage later.
- Mid-game when you have two items; her single-target burst matters less versus your sustain.
- Slow-push early, then freeze near tower; deny her roam angle and protect your team.
- Grasp for sustain scaling; it synergizes with tankiness and out-trades her poke over time.
- Force of Nature if she snowballs magic damage; otherwise prioritize Abyssal or Hollow Radiance.

drmundo__ornn.notes:
- Ornn's brittle procs and knockup chain lock you down; avoid his flame breath combo
- Play safe levels 1-3; respect his all-in potential and farm ranged with cleaver
- Bait his E knockup, then all-in with Q-W; dodge flame breath or reposition backward
- Post-6 his ultimate zones you hard; play around cooldown windows and respect damage spike
- His first item spike (mythic) around 10-12 minutes is dangerous; scale instead and farm safely
- Dr. Mundo spikes at level 9 and two items; abuse mid-game teamfight presence then
- Slow-push waves to deny his roaming and set up all-in kills when he overextends
- Take Grasp for sustain and trading pressure; Phase Rush if you need escape safety
- Buy Abyssal Mask early second item to tank his poke and maximize resistances

drmundo__trundle.notes:
- Trundle pillar locks you down; his ult shreds your resistances and steals stats hard.
- Play safe levels 1-3; respect his pillar range and avoid extended trades near walls.
- Bait his pillar before committing; trade when it's down; never fight near terrain.
- His ultimate counters your tankiness completely; play around cooldown and kite backward always.
- First Sunfire or Hollow Radiance spike hurts; play passive, farm safely, scale up instead.
- Post-15 minutes when you're tankier; all-in when his ult is down in fights.
- Slow-push into him; deny him freeze setups and pillar wall angles for ganks.
- Grasp scales your tankiness better than Phase Rush in this sustained damage matchup.
- Adaptive Helm reduces his sustained damage and his ult's stat-steal effectiveness significantly.

drmundo__kaisa.notes:
- Kai'Sa all-in burst with evolved Q and isolation damage chunks or kills you instantly
- Play safe and farm at range; her early damage is low, don't get isolated
- Never trade into her when she has isolation; bait her Q then all-in with cleaver
- Kai'Sa gains massive kill pressure and escape; respect her range and evolved abilities post-six
- First item spike (Manamune or Kraken) is dangerous; play passive and stack health early
- Dr. Mundo dominates mid-game teamfights; group and use tanking to outlast her burst
- Slow-push to deny her isolation kills; force grouped fights where her range matters less
- Grasp for sustain and tankiness; negates her poke and scales into team fights better
- Add Adaptive Helm if she's ahead or has AP threats; blocks her burst and synergizes

drmundo__fizz.notes:
- Fizz's all-in combo and untargetability make him deadly; respect his burst damage threat
- Play safe levels 1-3; farm at range with Q, avoid pushing into his level 2 all-in
- Bait his E with body positioning, then trade back with Q; never chase him down
- Post-6 Fizz ult is devastating; play around fog of war and respect the massive threat
- Fizz's first item spike (Protobelt or Lich) is dangerous; play safer, farm defensively then
- Your window is mid-game teamfights where his cooldowns are down; abuse his immobility then
- Slow-push waves to stack them and reduce his all-in kill range on you safely
- Pick Grasp for scaling, sustain, and win conditions in extended trades and late teamfights
- Buy Abyssal Mask early after core items to reduce his burst damage significantly

drmundo__teemo.notes:
- Teemo's blind and poison shred your tankiness and sustained damage output completely.
- Play safe levels 1-3; Teemo out-damages you early. Farm with Q from distance only.
- Never chase Teemo into brush. Bait his blind, then all-in with E-W combo.
- Teemo gains map control and zone denial with shrooms; respect them constantly.
- His first item spike (Liandry's or Nashor) is a danger window; play passive.
- Your power window arrives at Rylai's completion; kite with slowed enemies into teamfights.
- Slow-push into him; force him to choose between farm and shroom placement elsewhere.
- Take Grasp; sustain through poke and gain HP stacking for tank scaling advantage.
- Build Adaptive Helm after core to counter his poison and ability spam significantly.

drmundo__vayne.notes:
- Vayne's true damage passive and condemn wall stun lock you down hard; respect it
- Play safe levels 1-3; farm with cleaver; dodge condemn; don't chase her into walls
- Never trade after she lands condemn; bait her tumble then all-in with cleavers
- Post-6 her ult gives her stealth and kiting; your engage window shrinks significantly
- Vayne's first item spike (Kraken) is dangerous; farm safely and scale into teamfights
- Your window is post-Hollow Radiance when tankiness peaks; her poke becomes negligible then
- Slow-push to deny her condemn walls; give yourself space to dodge and chase
- Grasp for sustain and scaling; Vayne cannot burst through extended trades with Grasp procs
- Build Adaptive Helm after core; reduces her true damage and poke harassment over time

drmundo__sett.notes:
- Sett's Haymaker (E) stun into all-in burst kills you if you're caught extended
- Play safe levels 1-3; dodge his E at all costs, farm with Q from range
- Bait his E cooldown, then trade with Q and autos; never fight into prepared Haymaker
- Mundo ult sustain keeps you alive but Sett dominates short fights; respect his damage
- His Trinity Force spike around 10 minutes is dangerous; play defensive and stack HP early
- You outscale him significantly; punish him when his cooldowns are down post-15 minutes consistently
- Slow-push into him; deny him all-in opportunities and force him to overextend for farm
- Grasp for sustained trading and HP stacking to survive his burst damage consistently
- Hollow Radiance early slows his burst and gives you armor against his percent-health damage

drmundo__nautilus.notes:
- Nautilus root chains you down; his hook combo into ult deletion destroys your teamfight presence.
- Play safe levels 1-3; respect his hook range and farm from max distance with axe.
- Bait his hook by moving unpredictably, then all-in with Mundo Cleavers when it misses cooldown.
- Post-6 Nautilus ult is a guaranteed initiate; position deeper and use your ult reactively for healing.
- First Sunfire spike around 10 minutes is dangerous; play safer and stack resistances early.
- Your window is mid-game when Mundo tankiness peaks before Nautilus Abyssal Mask; abuse this.
- Slow-push waves into him; forces Nautilus to engage at your tower where you scale better.
- Take Grasp for sustain and short-trade healing; Phase Rush runs away but doesn't win trades.
- Build Hollow Radiance after core to tank his damage and reduce his hook-combo threat significantly.

drmundo__shen.notes:
- Shen's taunt locks you down, preventing kite/escape and enabling his team burst damage
- Play safe levels 1-3; Shen out-trades you early. Farm at range, respect his Q poke
- Avoid his taunt range entirely. Bait it with positioning, then all-in with E+Q combo
- Post-6 Shen ult removes him; use this window to hard-push lane or invade jungle
- Shen's Sunfire/Hollow Radiance spike hurts but doesn't counter you. Punish his ult cooldown instead
- Your power window is mid-game teamfights when Shen can't ult everyone. Group and engage
- Slow-push into him to stack wave, then crash for roam or jungle pressure timing
- Grasp of the Undying; sustain through his poke and wins extended short trades
- Add Hollow Radiance early if his team stacks magic damage; otherwise rush your core items

drmundo__leesin.notes:
- Lee Sin's Insec kick into your tower or teammates deals massive burst damage.
- Play safe levels 1-3; Lee Sin's early damage is high, farm cautiously.
- Bait his Q with unpredictable movement; dodge it, then trade with cleaver.
- His R at 6 becomes a primary kill threat; respect kick range always.
- Lee Sin spikes hardest at Sheen/Trinity; play defensively during his first-back power window.
- You spike when Lee Sin runs out of energy; punish his passive downtime.
- Slow-push waves so Lee Sin cannot roam freely to gank your teammates.
- Take Grasp for consistent sustain and poke to wear him down safely.
- Build Adaptive Helm after core items to reduce his repeated ability damage significantly.

drmundo__maokai.notes:
- Maokai's root chains you down; his sustained damage and CC lock you out completely.
- Play safe levels 1-3; respect his root range and farm from distance with Cleaver.
- Bait his root with movement, then all-in when it's on cooldown; dodge his saplings.
- Post-6 Maokai ult negates your engage; play around cooldown windows and don't force fights.
- First Liandry's spike hurts; play safer but this isn't your danger window yet.
- You spike mid-game when Maokai roots miss or you've stacked enough health and regen.
- Slow-push waves into him; force him to choose between roaming or losing CS safely.
- Take Grasp for sustain and trading power; it outscales his poke in extended fights.
- Consider Abyssal Mask early if he's ahead; reduces his burst and amplification threat significantly.

drmundo__syndra.notes:
- Syndra's burst combo and stun lock you down, preventing healing and kiting away safely.
- Play safe, farm at range with Cleaver, dodge her Q harass, don't get close early.
- Bait her stun, then all-in when it's down; respect her damage before level 3.
- Her ultimate scales hard; respect range and position behind minions to block orb damage.
- First Liandry's spike hurts; farm safely and scale; you outscale her significantly post-items.
- Mid-game teamfights when you have items; she burns mana faster than you burn health.
- Slow-push to stack wave, then threaten all-in; prevents her from roaming and poking freely.
- Grasp sustains through poke; gives health and damage scaling that Phase Rush doesn't provide.
- Kaenic Lifegrip converts her damage into your healing; blocks her burst and heals you.
